verses.text: Tua ciangin Zedekiah in Babylon kumpipa lehdo hi. Tua ahih manin ama uk a kum kuana, tua kum a kha sawmna, tua kha a ni sawm ni-in Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar a galkap khempeuh tawh Jerusalem a sim dingin hong kuanin tua khua a umcih uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in a kimkotah umcihna ding pan'mun a bawl uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Zedekiah' kum sawmlekhatna kum dong tua khuapi ki-umcih hi
A kha lina a ni kua ni-in tua khuapi sungah kialpi nasia mahmah ahih manin tua gam mite-a' ding an omlo hi

Tua ciangin khuapikulh sulet uh hi. Khaldea mite khuapi kiimah a ompi mahin, kumpipa' huan kiang lam kulhpi nih kikal kulhkongpi lampi zui-in kumpipa leh a galhang mi khempeuh zanin a tai uh hi. Arabah lam manawhin amaute pai uh hi
Ahih hangin Khaldea mite' galkapte in kumpipa delh uh a, Jerikho zanglei-ah amah pha uh hi; tua ciangin a galkap khempeuh ama kiang panin kithehthang hi
Tua ciangin amaute in kumpipa man uh a, ama tungah thukhenna a pia, Riblah-a Babylon kumpipa kiangah amah paipih uh hi
Amaute in Zedekiah' muhna-ah a tapate thatin, Zedekiah' mitte khelkhia uh a, amah kol bulhin Babylon-ah a paipih uh hi.
A kha ngana, tua kha a ni sagih ni-in, Babylon Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar' kum sawmlekuana kumin, Babylon kumpipa' nasem, amah a cingte a ukpa Nebuzaradan Jerusalem-ah hong pai hi
Amah in Topa' biakinn-a kipan kumpipa' inn leh Jerusalem khuasunga om inn khempeuh hal a, inn lian khempeuh amah in haltum hi
Tua ciangin a cingte a ukpa tawh a om Khaldea mi galkapte khempeuh in Jerusalem kimkota kulhpi susia uh hi
Tua ciangin a cingte a ukpa Nebuzaradan in khuapi sungah a kinusia a omlai mite leh Babylon kumpipa a taisan mite, mihonpi a omlai teng khempeuh salin paipih khawm hi
Ahih hangin a cingte a ukpa in leenggui lote a en ding leh lo kho dingin tua gammi a zawngpente pawlkhat nusia lai hi
Tua ciangin Topa' biakinn sungah a om sumngo khuampite, Topa' biakinn sungah a om tuikuang kingaknate, leh sumngo tuikuangpi, Khaldea mite in satnen uh a, Babylon-ah a sumngo pua uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in beelte, kawbiate, taitehte, paknamtui-a' dingin pakante, leh biakinn sung nasepna-a kizang sumngo nazatte khempeuh
vutluahna, leh haite lakhia uh hi. A cingte a ukpa in kham ahite kham mahin la-in, ngun ahite a ngun mahin a la hi
Solomon in Topa' biakinn-a dinga a bawl khuampi nihte, tuikuangpi khat, leh a kingaknate, sumngo tawh kibawl hih nazatte khempeuh ahih leh tawi teh zawh ding hilo hi

Khuampi khat a san'na pi sawmnihlesagih hi a, tua tungah sumngo khuamluzepna khat om hi; khuamluzepna a san'na pi li leh alang ahi hi. Sumngo tawh a kibawl ngen banga kikalh simsiam leh mang kawlsingte khuamluzepna kimkotah om hi. A khuampi nihna zong tua mah bangin, ngen banga kikalh simsiam tawh ahi hi
Tua ciangin a cingte a ukpa in siampi lianpa Seraiah, siampi nihna Zefaniah, leh kong a cing mi thumte a la hi

Tua ciangin khuapi panin galkapte a uk ngei ulian khat, leh khuapi sungah a om kumpipa' thukuppihte mi nga a la hi. Tua ciangin gamsung mite a khawm galkapte a ukpa' lai-atpa a la hi. Tua ciangin khuapi sungah a om tua gamsung mi sawmguk a la hi
Tua ciangin a cingte a ukpa Nebuzaradan in amaute la-in Riblah-a Babylon kumpipa kiangah amaute a paipih hi
Tua ciangin Babylon kumpipa in amaute vat a, Hamath gamsung Riblah-ah amaute a that hi. Tua ahih ciangin amau' gam panin salin Judah mite kilakhia hi.
Tua ciangin Judah gam sungah a omlai, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a nusiatte tungah a uk dingin Shafan' tapa Ahikam, a tapa Gedaliah amah in a seh hi

Tu-in gamsunga om galkap a ukte leh a mite in Babylon kumpipa in a uk dingin Gedaliah a sehna thu a zak uh ciangin amaute a mite uh tawh Mizpah-a Gedaliah kiangah hong pai uh hi. Tuate pen Nethaniah' tapa Ishmael, Kareah' tapa Johanan, Netofah mi Tanhumeth' tapa Seraiah, leh Maakath mi Jaazaniah ahi uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute leh a mite uh tungah Gedaliah kiciamin, “Khaldea mi uliante' hangin lau kei un; gam sungah tengin, Babylon kumpipa' na sem un. Tua hi leh note-a' dingin thu hong nuam ding hi,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin a kha sagihna sungin kumpi innkuan sung panin Elishama' tapa Nethaniah, a tapa Ishmael mihing sawm tawh hong kuanin Gedaliah leh Mizpah-ah amah tawh a om Judah mi leh Khaldea mite simin a that hi
Tua ciangin a lian a neu-in mi khempeuh, leh galkap a ukte kithawi-in Egypt-ah pai uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Khaldea mite kihta uh hi.

Judah kumpi Jehoiakhin thong sungah a omzawh kum sawmthum leh kum sagihna kum, kha sawmlenihna, tua kha ni sawmnihlesagih ni, Babylon kumpipa Evilmerodak in uk ding a kipat kumin, hehpihna tawh thong panin Judah kumpi Jehoiakhin a khah hi
Amah in migitna kam tawh amah hopih a, Babylon sunga amah tawh a om kumpi a mat dangte khempeuh sangin a sangzaw-in amah a pahtawi hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jehoiakhin in a thong puante suahkhia hi. Tua ciangin a nuntak sung nisimin kumpipa' sabuai-ah a manmanin an a ne hi
Tua ciangin ama ngahthuap dingin, amah a nuntaksung tawntung nisimin tanh khat, a manmanin ngahthuapna ama tungah kumpipa in a pia hi.
